name: SprintLoop

pricing_tiers.notes: Adds SSO, advanced reporting, API access

features: team workload overview (view only, no planning tools)
known_limitations: No built-in time tracking — ChronoLog or equivalent still required
No client portal — external stakeholder access not supported
No billing integration with VaultLedger or any finance tool
SSO only on Business tier (£2.80/seat = £420/mo at 150 seats) — negates saving vs TaskBridge
Designed for software engineering teams — poor fit for consulting project delivery
Gantt chart absent — milestone view only
notes: Team tier: £240/mo vs TaskBridge £290/mo = £50/mo saving (£600/yr). BUT: SSO required (>10 seats) → must use Business tier at £2.80/seat × 150 = £420/mo — more expensive than TaskBridge. Additionally: no time tracking (ChronoLog cost remains), no client portal, no billing integration, no Gantt. Resolves none of TaskBridge's known issues. Built for software dev teams, not consulting. STAY verdict — SSO tier pricing eliminates saving, and tool is a poor functional fit for consulting project delivery.
